title: Sweet Moroccan Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic side dish that combines the sweetness of dates with the spices of Morocco. Perfect for accompanying a variety of meals.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the honey, cinnamon, and ginger to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the pitted dates to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork to separate the grains.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dates if desired.
